description_long: This adult pedestrian is dressed in elaborate historical attire reminiscent of 18th-century European fashion. He wears a long, ornate coat with intricate patterns over a shirt and knee-length breeches, complemented by stockings and period-appropriate shoes. His head is adorned with a tricorne hat, and he sports a voluminous, curled wig tied at the back with a ribbon. The figure's hands are visible, and his facial features are detailed, including a prominent nose and a composed expression. The overall appearance suggests a person of status or nobility from a bygone era, likely intended to evoke a sense of historical authenticity. The clothing and accessories are highly stylized, making the figure stand out in any urban or period-themed environment.
description: An adult male figure in ornate 18th-century European attire, featuring a long patterned coat, tricorne hat, curled wig, and period shoes. The detailed costume and accessories evoke a sense of historical nobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full ornate coat, facial features, tricorne hat, and both arms slightly bent.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the detailed sleeve, and the outstretched left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the coat, the tied ribbon on the wig, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right profile, the wig's curls, and the right arm extended slightly backward.
attribute_clothing_type: historical long coat with intricate patterns, knee-length breeches, stockings, period shoes, and a tricorne hat with a curled wig
attribute_posture: standing with arms slightly bent and one arm extended
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length curled wig tied at the back
